# mistershell_credential (Resource)

Manages a MisterShell credential. Credentials are encrypted at rest and used by network resources for authentication.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `credential_data` (String, Sensitive) Credential secret data as JSON. Use jsonencode() in HCL. Fields vary by credential_type. Note: the API masks secret values in responses, so this value is stored from config, not read back from the server.
- `credential_type` (String) Credential type. Cannot be changed after creation.
- `name` (String) Unique credential name.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Credential description.
- `extra_data` (String) Non-sensitive metadata as JSON. Use jsonencode() in HCL.
- `requires_user_mapping` (Boolean) Whether users must fill their own credential copy for interactive sessions.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `id` (Number) Credential ID.
- `updated_at` (String) Last update timestamp.
